title: Past simple: was / were
explanation:
Past simple of be: was / were

  • I / he / she / it → was
  • You / we / they → were

Questions: Was she at home? Were they happy?

Negative: wasn't, weren't

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option to complete the sentences.

questions.text: We [*weren't|wasn't|aren't] at home — we were out.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Where ____ you last night? | *were | was | are
He ____ at work on Monday. | *was | were | is
It ____ a great holiday. | *was | were | is

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option to complete the sentences.

questions.text: She [*was|were|did] my best friend at school.
